rows.agent_rationale: Largest stimulated footprint (3014 DE at Stim8hr) with on-target KD at its strongest condition and K562-inert cell-type-specific verdict.
rows.specificity: Rest 175 DE, K562 1 DE, RPE1 not measured
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.

rows.agent_rationale: Strong Stim48hr footprint (1167 DE) with on-target KD, low Rest DE (58), and cell-type-specific (K562 inert).
rows.specificity: Rest 58 DE, K562 5 DE, RPE1 not measured
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.

rows.agent_rationale: On-target 780-DE Stim48hr footprint but the Rest condition carries a 'putative off-target' KD flag, warranting capacity gating.
rows.specificity: Rest 113 DE, K562 20 DE, RPE1 not measured
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.

rows.agent_rationale: On-target 720-DE Stim8hr footprint and cell-type-specific, but elevated Rest DE (190) makes it a capacity-gated candidate.
rows.specificity: Rest 190 DE, K562 1 DE, RPE1 not measured
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.

rows.agent_rationale: Clean on-target 619-DE Stim48hr footprint that is K562-inert but mid-tier in magnitude, fitting capacity-dependent advancement.
rows.specificity: Rest 116 DE, K562 13 DE, RPE1 not measured
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.

rows.agent_rationale: On-target 457-DE footprint at its strongest Stim48hr condition with low Rest DE (20), though Stim8hr shows no on-target KD, so gate on capacity.
rows.specificity: Rest 20 DE, K562 1 DE, RPE1 not measured
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.

rows.agent_rationale: Clean on-target 407-DE Stim8hr footprint with low Rest DE (19) but a smaller, less distinctive footprint suited to backup ranking.
rows.specificity: Rest 19 DE, K562 1 DE, RPE1 not measured
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.

rows.agent_rationale: Smallest stimulated footprint (389 DE) among the eight, on-target and cell-type-specific but lowest-magnitude, best held as a ranked backup.
rows.specificity: Rest 11 DE, K562 13 DE, RPE1 not measured
stop_rules: failed on-target knockdown in the stimulated condition
Loss of the stimulated DE footprint after orthogonal knockdown would lower priority.
